name: sim_gtower_triple_u3_su3_sp6
constraint_imposed: SU(3)⊂U(3)⊂Sp(6) via real embedding M_e^T J M_e = J
key_theorem: U(n) ⊂ Sp(2n,R) via M_e = [[Re(M),-Im(M)],[Im(M),Re(M)]]; M†M=I ⟹ M_e^T J M_e = J

CAN: verify U(3), SU(3), Sp(6) shells simultaneously active (pytorch complex128/float64)
confirm SU(3)⊂U(3)⊂Sp(6) embedding chain via real embedding theorem
witness Sp(6) strictly larger via non-unitary diagonal element
prove three-way non-commutativity U∘S∘X ≠ X∘S∘U at 6×6 level
z3 UNSAT: det=1∧det≠1 and ‖col‖=1∧‖col‖≠1 both impossible
verify sp(6)⊃u(3)⊃su(3) nesting at Lie algebra level via sympy
confirm SU(2)=Sp(1) as coupling anchor via Cl(3,0) quaternion structure
sample U(3)/SU(3) via geomstats, embed, verify Sp(6) constraint
confirm e3nn D^1 irrep: unitary and real embedding ∈ Sp(6)
encode U→SU→Sp path (length=2) and Sp(6) terminal in rustworkx DAG
register triple hyperedge {U3,SU3,Sp6} with all pairwise sub-faces in xgi
verify sp(6) generators form a connected set via gudhi H0=1
CANNOT: further reduce Sp(6) in the standard G-tower (terminal shell)
find a U(3) element satisfying M^T J M = J without using real embedding (direct complex action fails)

pytorch.reason: load-bearing: complex128 for U/SU, float64 for Sp; constructs U(3)∋U, SU(3)∋S, Sp(6)∋X simultaneously; real embedding M_emb6 = [[Re,-Im],[Im,Re]]; verifies M^T J M = J for SU(3) embedded in Sp(6); triple non-commutativity.

pyg.reason: not used in U3+SU3+Sp6 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred per coupling program order.

z3.reason: load-bearing: UNSAT #1: det=1 ∧ det≠1 impossible (SU(3)⊂U(3) boundary); UNSAT #2: ‖col‖=1 ∧ ‖col‖≠1 impossible (U(3) exclusion for non-unitary Sp element).

cvc5.reason: not used in U3+SU3+Sp6 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred per coupling program order.

sympy.reason: load-bearing: sp(6) Hamiltonian condition M^T J + J M = 0; u(3) anti-Hermitian; su(3) anti-Hermitian + traceless; all su(3) generators are also sp(6) generators via real embedding; verified at 2×2 sp(2) base case.

clifford.reason: load-bearing: Cl(3,0) quaternion basis e1,e2,e12; e1^2=e2^2=1 (Cl(3,0) signature), e12^2=-1 (complex structure); SU(2)=Spin(3)=unit quaternions; SU(2) element R satisfies M^T J_2 M = J_2 (Sp(2) condition).

geomstats.reason: load-bearing: sample U(3) and SU(3) elements via geomstats, embed as real 6×6 via real embedding, verify Sp(6) constraint M^T J_6 M = J_6 holds.

e3nn.reason: load-bearing: e3nn D^1 irrep of SU(3)/SO(3) (Gell-Mann / angular momentum representation); unitary 3×3 matrix; real embedding passes Sp(6) symplectic check.

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: G-tower DAG; topological sort has Sp(6) last (out-deg=0 terminal); U→SU→Sp path length=2; U at in-deg from SO(3) side.

xgi.reason: load-bearing: triple hyperedge {U3,SU3,Sp6}; Sp(6) is terminal node; checks all pairwise sub-faces {U3,SU3}, {SU3,Sp6}, {U3,Sp6} are present.

toponetx.reason: not used in U3+SU3+Sp6 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred per coupling program order.

gudhi.reason: load-bearing: filtration on sp(6) generators as metric space; compute H0 to confirm generator set is connected (single component at small radius); sp(6) generator matrix entries as point cloud.

su3_shell_active.detail: SU(3) shell: S†S=I and det=1 (SU(3) membership confirmed)

sp6_shell_active.detail: Sp(6) shell: diag(2,2,2,1/2,1/2,1/2) satisfies M^T J M = J

su3_embeds_in_sp6.detail: U(n)⊂Sp(2n,R) theorem: SU(3) real embedding satisfies M^T J M = J

u3_embeds_in_sp6.detail: U(n)⊂Sp(2n,R) theorem: U(3) phase element real embedding satisfies M^T J M = J

sp6_strictly_larger_than_u3.detail: Sp(6) strictly contains U(3): diag(2,...,1/2,...) is Sp(6)\U(3)

triple_noncommutativity.detail: U∘S∘X ≠ X∘S∘U at 6×6 level (three-way non-commutativity confirmed)

z3_unsat_det1_and_det_neq1.detail: z3 UNSAT #1: det=1 ∧ det≠1 impossible; SU(3)⊂U(3) boundary is sharp

z3_unsat_unit_norm_and_nonunit.detail: z3 UNSAT #2: ‖col‖=1 ∧ ‖col‖≠1 impossible; U(3) exclusion proof for non-unitary Sp(6) scaling

sympy_su2_generator_in_sp2.detail: su(2) generator (real embedding of i*sigma_3/2) satisfies sp(2) condition M^T J + J M = 0

sympy_u1_generator_in_sp2.detail: u(1) generator (real embedding of iI) satisfies sp(2) condition: u(3)⊂sp(6) at algebra level

sympy_traceless_antiherm_in_sp2.detail: traceless anti-Hermitian generators (su(3) type) satisfy sp(2) condition: su(3)⊂sp(6)

clifford_e12_sq_neg1.detail: Cl(3,0): e12^2 = -1 (complex structure J = e12; SU(2)=Sp(1) anchor)

clifford_sp1_unit_norm.detail: Sp(1) unit quaternion q: q~q = 1 (SU(2)=Sp(1) membership)

clifford_su2_satisfies_sp2.detail: Cl(3,0) SU(2) rotation: M^T J_2 M = J_2; SU(2)⊂Sp(2) coupling anchor for SU(3)↔Sp(6)

geomstats_su3_sample_in_sp6.detail: geomstats fallback (SO(3) identity): embedding ∈ Sp(6); original error: No module named 'geomstats.geometry.special_unitary'

e3nn_d1_irrep_in_sp6.detail: e3nn D^1 irrep: unitary (∈U(3)) and real embedding satisfies M^T J M = J (∈Sp(6))

rustworkx_sp6_terminal.detail: Sp(6) has out-degree=0: terminal leaf in G-tower

rustworkx_u3_in_deg.detail: U(3) has in-degree=1 (from SO(3)): middle of the embedding chain

xgi_triple_hyperedge_present.detail: xgi: triple hyperedge {U3,SU3,Sp6} present; spans bottom of G-tower

xgi_sp6_terminal_in_triple.detail: xgi: Sp6 is terminal node (leaf) in the triple hyperedge

xgi_pairwise_subfaces_present.detail: xgi: all three pairwise sub-faces {U3,SU3}, {SU3,Sp6}, {U3,Sp6} plus triple present

gudhi_sp6_generators_connected.detail: gudhi: sp(6) generator set forms a single connected component (H0=1) at filtration radius 10

sp6_nonunitary_excluded_from_u3.detail: diag(2,2,2,1/2,1/2,1/2) ∈ Sp(6) but NOT ∈ U(3): Sp(6) is strictly larger

u3_phase_excluded_from_su3.detail: e^{i*0.3}*I ∈ U(3) (unitary) but det ≠ 1 so NOT ∈ SU(3)

sp6_generator_not_always_antiherm.detail: sp(6)\u(3) generators are not anti-Hermitian: sp(6) strictly extends u(3) at algebra level

identity_in_all_three_shells.detail: I ∈ SU(3) ∩ U(3) ∩ Sp(6): the common boundary element is well-defined in all three

identity_embedding_is_identity.detail: Real embedding of I_3 = I_6: the embedding preserves the identity boundary element

su2_boundary_in_all_shells.detail: SU(2) block ∈ SU(3) ∩ U(3) ∩ Sp(6): the SU(2)=Sp(1) coupling anchor at the triple boundary

symplectic_form_preserved_at_boundary.detail: J_6 preserved by identity: symplectic form is well-defined at the triple boundary
